267→    private fun rearrangeSuperTypeList(
268→        node: ASTNode,
269→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
270→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
271→    ) {
272→        val entries = (node.psi as KtSuperTypeList).entries
273→        if (
274→            node.textContains('\n') &&
275→            entries.size > 1 &&
276→            // e.g.
277→            //
278→            // class A : B, C,
279→            //     D
280→            // or
281→            // class A : B, C({
282→            // }), D
283→            //
284→            // but not
285→            //
286→            // class A : B, C, D({
287→            // })
288→            !(
289→                entries.dropLast(1).all { it.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY } &&
290→                    entries.last().elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY
291→                )
292→        ) {
293→            // put space after :
294→            if (!node.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
295→                val colon = node.prevCodeLeaf()!!
296→                if (
297→                    !colon.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
298→                    colon.prevCodeLeaf().let { it?.elementType != RPAR || !it.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
299→                ) {
300→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(colon, autoCorrect, emit, node.lineIndent() + indentConfig.indent)
301→                }
302→            }
303→            // put entries on separate lines
304→            // TODO: group emit()s below with the one above into one (similar to ParameterListWrappingRule)
305→            for (c in node.children()) {
306→                if (c.elementType == COMMA &&
307→                    !c.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
308→                    !c.isFollowedByCommentOnSameLine()
309→                ) {
310→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
311→                        nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired = c,
312→                        autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
313→                        emit = emit,
314→                        indent = node.lineIndent(),
315→                    )
316→                }
317→            }
318→        }
319→    }
320→
321→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByCommentOnSameLine() =
322→        nextLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
323→            ?.isPartOfComment() == true
324→
325→    private fun rearrangeValueList(
326→        node: ASTNode,
327→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
328→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
329→    ) {
330→        for (c in node.children()) {
331→            val hasLineBreak = when (c.elementType) {
332→                VALUE_ARGUMENT -> c.hasLineBreak(LAMBDA_EXPRESSION, FUN)
333→                VALUE_PARAMETER, ANNOTATION -> c.hasLineBreak()
334→                else -> false
335→            }
336→            if (hasLineBreak) {
337→                // rearrange
338→                //
339→                // a, b, value(
340→                // ), c, d
341→                //
342→                // to
343→                //
344→                // a, b,
345→                // value(
346→                // ),
347→                // c, d
348→
349→                // insert \n in front of multi-line value
350→                val prevSibling = c.prevSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
351→                if (
352→                    prevSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
353→                    !prevSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
354→                ) {
355→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(prevSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
356→                }
357→                // insert \n after multi-line value
358→                val nextSibling = c.nextSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
359→                val hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter =
360→                    c.isLastValueParameter() && c.firstChildNode.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION
361→                if (
362→                    nextSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
363→                    !hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter &&
364→                    !nextSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
365→                    // value(
366→                    // ), // a comment
367→                    // c, d
368→                    nextSibling.treeNext?.treeNext?.psi !is PsiComment
369→                ) {
370→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(nextSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
371→                }
372→            }
373→        }
374→    }
375→
376→    private fun ASTNode.isLastValueParameter() =
377→        elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER &&
378→            siblings().none { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
379→
380→    private fun rearrangeClosingQuote(
381→        node: ASTNode,
382→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
383→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
384→    ) {
385→        node
386→            .treeParent
387→            .takeIf { it.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE }
388→            ?.let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
389→            ?.takeIf { it.isMultiLine() }
390→            ?.takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }
391→            ?.takeIf { node.treePrev.text.isNotBlank() }
392→            ?.let {
393→                // rewriting
394→                // """
395→                //     text
396→                // _""".trimIndent()
397→                // to
398→                // """
399→                //     text
400→                // _
401→                // """.trimIndent()
402→                emit(
403→                    node.startOffset,
404→                    "Missing newline before \"\"\"",
405→                    true,
406→                )
407→                if (autoCorrect) {
408→                    node as LeafPsiElement
409→                    node.rawInsertBeforeMe(LeafPsiElement(LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY, "\n"))
410→                }
411→                LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline before (closing) \"\"\"" }
412→            }
413→    }
414→
415→    private fun mustBeFollowedByNewline(node: ASTNode): Boolean {
416→        // find EOL token (last token before \n)
417→        // if token is in lTokenSet
418→        //     find matching rToken
419→        //     return true if there is no newline after the rToken
420→        // return false
421→        val nextCodeSibling = node.nextCodeSibling() // e.g. BINARY_EXPRESSION
422→        var lToken = nextCodeSibling?.nextLeaf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }?.prevCodeLeaf()
423→        if (lToken != null && lToken.elementType !in LTOKEN_SET) {
424→            // special cases:
425→            // x = y.f({ z ->
426→            // })
427→            // x = y.f(0, 1,
428→            // 2, 3)
429→            lToken = lToken.prevLeaf { it.elementType in LTOKEN_SET || it == node }
430→        }
431→        if (lToken != null && lToken.elementType in LTOKEN_SET) {
432→            val rElementType = MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP[lToken.elementType]
433→            val rToken = lToken.nextSibling { it.elementType == rElementType }
434→            return rToken?.treeParent == lToken.treeParent
435→        }
436→        if (nextCodeSibling?.textContains('\n') == false) {
437→            return true
438→        }
439→        return false
440→    }
441→
442→    private fun rearrangeArrow(
443→        node: ASTNode,
444→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
445→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
446→    ) {
447→        val p = node.treeParent
448→        if (
449→            // check
450→            // `{ p -> ... }`
451→            // and
452→            // `when { m -> ... }`
453→            // only
454→            p.elementType.let { it != FUNCTION_LITERAL && it != WHEN_ENTRY } ||
455→            // ... and only if expression after -> spans multiple lines
456→            !p.textContains('\n') ||
457→            // permit
458→            // when {
459→            //     m -> 0 + d({
460→            //     })
461→            // }
462→            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && mustBeFollowedByNewline(node)) ||
463→            // permit
464→            // when (this) {
465→            //     in 0x1F600..0x1F64F, // Emoticons
466→            //     0x200D // Zero-width Joiner
467→            //     -> true
468→            // }
469→            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && node.prevLeaf()?.textContains('\n') == true)
470→        ) {
471→            return
472→        }
473→        if (!node.nextCodeLeaf()?.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
474→            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit)
475→        }
476→        val r = node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE } ?: return
477→        if (!r.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
478→            requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(r, autoCorrect, emit, node.lineIndent())
479→        }
480→    }
481→
482→    private fun requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(
483→        node: ASTNode,
484→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
485→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
486→        indent: String,
487→    ) {
488→        emit(
489→            node.startOffset - 1,
490→            """Missing newline before "${node.text}"""",
491→            true,
492→        )
493→        LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + ((if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline before ${node.text}") }
494→        if (autoCorrect) {
495→            node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n" + indent)
496→        }
497→    }
498→
499→    private fun requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
500→        nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired: ASTNode,
501→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
502→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
503→        indent: String? = null,
504→        nodeToFix: ASTNode = nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired,
505→    ) {
506→        emit(
507→            nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.startOffset + 1,
508→            """Missing newline after "${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}"""",
509→            true,
510→        )
511→        LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline after ${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}" }
512→        if (autoCorrect) {
513→            val tempIndent = indent ?: (nodeToFix.lineIndent() + indentConfig.indent)
514→            nodeToFix.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe("\n" + tempIndent)
515→        }
516→    }

518→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isMultiLine(): Boolean {
519→        for (child in node.children()) {
520→            if (child.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY) {
521→                val v = child.text
522→                if (v == "\n") {
523→                    return true
524→                }
525→            }
526→        }
527→        return false
528→    }
529→
530→    private fun ASTNode.hasLineBreak(vararg ignoreElementTypes: IElementType): Boolean {
531→        if (isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) return true
532→        return if (ignoreElementTypes.isEmpty()) {
533→            textContains('\n')
534→        } else {
535→            elementType !in ignoreElementTypes &&
536→                children().any { c -> c.textContains('\n') && c.elementType !in ignoreElementTypes }
537→        }
538→    }
539→
540→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimIndent() = isFollowedBy("trimIndent()")
541→
542→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimMargin() = isFollowedBy("trimMargin()")
543→
544→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedBy(callExpressionName: String) =
545→        this.node.nextSibling { it.elementType != DOT }
546→            .let { it?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION && it.text == callExpressionName }
547→
548→    /**
549→     *  Allow for-statement in which only the expression contains a newline:
550→     *     for (foo in listOf(
551→     *         "foo-1",
552→     *         "foo-2"
553→     *     )) { ... }
554→     * but reject:
555→     *     for (
556→     *         foo in listOf(
557→     *             "foo-1",
558→     *             "foo-2"
559→     *         )
560→     *     ) { ... }
561→     */
562→    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression(): Boolean {
563→        if (treeParent.elementType != ElementType.FOR) {
564→            return false
565→        }
566→        if (this.elementType != LPAR) {
567→            return treeParent.findChildByType(LPAR)!!.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression()
568→        }
569→        require(elementType == LPAR) {
570→            "Node should be the LPAR of the FOR loop"
571→        }
572→
573→        var node: ASTNode? = this
574→        while (node != null && node.elementType != RPAR) {
575→            if (node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
576→                return false
577→            }
578→            node = node.nextSibling { true }
579→        }
580→        return true
581→    }
582→
583→    private fun ASTNode.isResultingInLineBreak(): Boolean =
584→        isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() ||
585→            ((elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY || elementType == REGULAR_STRING_PART) && textContains('\n'))
586→
587→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
588→        node: ASTNode,
589→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
590→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
591→    ) {
592→        if (node.elementType == BLOCK) {
593→            val startOfBlock = node.prevLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
594→            if (startOfBlock?.elementType != LBRACE) {
595→                return
596→            }
597→            val blockIsPrecededByWhitespaceContainingNewline = startOfBlock.nextLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
598→            val endOfBlock = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
599→            val blockIsFollowedByWhitespaceContainingNewline = endOfBlock?.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
600→            val wrapBlock =
601→                !blockIsFollowedByWhitespaceContainingNewline && (
602→                    blockIsPrecededByWhitespaceContainingNewline || node.textContains('\n')
603→                    )
604→            if (wrapBlock && endOfBlock != null) {
605→                requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(
606→                    endOfBlock,
607→                    autoCorrect,
608→                    emit,
609→                    node.treeParent.lineIndent(),
610→                )
611→            }
612→        }
613→    }
614→
615→    private companion object {
616→        private val LTOKEN_SET = TokenSet.create(LPAR, LBRACE, LBRACKET, LT)
617→        private val RTOKEN_SET = TokenSet.create(RPAR, RBRACE, RBRACKET, GT)
618→        private val MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP =
619→            LTOKEN_SET.types.zip(
620→                RTOKEN_SET.types,
621→            ).toMap()
622→    }
